name: Chris Woods
abstract: Chris Woods (December 25, 1925, Memphis, Tennessee – July 4, 1985, New York City) was an American jazz alto saxophonist. Woods played locally in Memphis early in his career before moving to St.

about_quotes.speaker: Terry Clark
about_quotes.evidence: We had Charles Davis on baritone [saxophone]. We had Charlie Williams on alto [saxophone], Chris Woods.
